title: You are a structured-output adapter for Cognee.

turns.text: Reading `output/cognee_codex_full_v2_bundle/nodes.jsonl` to extract entities and relationships, then I’ll return a schema-valid knowledge graph JSON only.

I’ve sampled the bundle and it is a mixed research corpus: topics, methods, repositories, papers, claims, and evidence spans centered on world models, 3D/4D vision, and code-intelligence tools. I’m collapsing that into a small, coherent graph instead of reproducing noisy claim fragments.
Checking a few representative entities and dates in the file so the graph stays grounded in the actual bundle contents.

turns.name: exec_command
turns.text: {"cmd":"rg -n 'GitNexus|AutoAgent|LEGO-SLAM|ReSplat|RoMo|ViBA|openeyes|World Model|Gaussian Splatting|Point Cloud|LLM Reasoning|3D/4D Vision and Reconstruction|Research Literature' output/cognee_codex_full_v2_bundle/nodes.jsonl | sed -n '1,120p'","workdir":"/Users/neo/Developer/Projects/LLM-Wiki","max_output_tokens":12000,"yield_time_ms":1000}
